languages.text: "Обитатели его — слуги {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} — приносят извинения за неподобающий прием ввиду критической — останавливающей — фрактуры процессов". {n}Звук из вокс-модулятора техножреца льется мягко, почти убаюкивающе жужжа на одной ноте, без намека на интонацию. {/n}

traits.locale_text: "Обитатели его — слуги {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} — приносят извинения за неподобающий прием ввиду критической — останавливающей — фрактуры процессов". {n}Звук из вокс-модулятора техножреца льется мягко, почти убаюкивающе жужжа на одной ноте, без намека на интонацию. {/n}

languages.text: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}

languages.text: 「説明: この部隊は、現在進行中の深刻な状況により、不適切な対応をしてしまい、お詫び申し上げます。」{n}テクプリストのヴォックス・モジュレーターから、まるで催眠術のように、単音でわずかにうねるような音が聞こえてくる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Explanation: this unit apologises for the unfitting reception due to the ongoing critical situation." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}

traits.locale_text: 「説明: この部隊は、現在進行中の深刻な状況により、不適切な対応をしてしまい、お詫び申し上げます。」{n}テクプリストのヴォックス・モジュレーターから、まるで催眠術のように、単音でわずかにうねるような音が聞こえてくる。{n}

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} hizmetkârları olan istasyon sakinleri, süreçlerdeki kritik ve kesintiye neden olan aksak karşılama için özür dilemekte." {n}Tekno Rahip'in voks modülatöründen gelen ses; herhangi bir vurgudan yoksun, tek bir notayla neredeyse uyutucu bir uğultu gibi süzülüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} hizmetkârları olan istasyon sakinleri, süreçlerdeki kritik ve kesintiye neden olan aksak karşılama için özür dilemekte." {n}Tekno Rahip'in voks modülatöründen gelen ses; herhangi bir vurgudan yoksun, tek bir notayla neredeyse uyutucu bir uğultu gibi süzülüyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Sus habitantes, sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, lamentan tener que {mf|recibirlo|recibirla} de manera impropia debido a una interrupción crítica de diversos procesos». {n}El sonido parece brotar delicadamente del vocomodulador del tecnosacerdote en un tono tan monótono y carente de inflexiones que casi parece un arrullo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sus habitantes, sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, lamentan tener que {mf|recibirlo|recibirla} de manera impropia debido a una interrupción crítica de diversos procesos». {n}El sonido parece brotar delicadamente del vocomodulador del tecnosacerdote en un tono tan monótono y carente de inflexiones que casi parece un arrullo.{/n}

languages.text: “此地的居民——{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的仆从——因当前进程发生了关键性的……中断性……破裂，导致接待不周，对此深表歉意。”{n}声音似乎从技术神甫的音阵调制器中缓缓流出，那是近乎催眠的单调嗡鸣，听不出任何抑扬顿挫。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}

traits.locale_text: “此地的居民——{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的仆从——因当前进程发生了关键性的……中断性……破裂，导致接待不周，对此深表歉意。”{n}声音似乎从技术神甫的音阵调制器中缓缓流出，那是近乎催眠的单调嗡鸣，听不出任何抑扬顿挫。{/n}

languages.text: « Ces occupants... des serviteurs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}... vous prient de bien vouloir l'excuser pour l'accueil indigne résultant de... l'interruption critique... des processus. » {n}Le ronronnement diffus qui s'élève du modulateur-vox du technoprêtre vous berce telle une litanie monocorde, dénuée de toute modulation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ces occupants... des serviteurs de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}... vous prient de bien vouloir l'excuser pour l'accueil indigne résultant de... l'interruption critique... des processus. » {n}Le ronronnement diffus qui s'élève du modulateur-vox du technoprêtre vous berce telle une litanie monocorde, dénuée de toute modulation.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihre Bewohner — Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — entschuldigen sich für den unangemessenen Empfang aufgrund der kritischen ... Unterbrechung der Prozesse." {n}Das Geräusch scheint aus dem Voxmodulator des Techpriesters zu kommen, ein einschläferndes Summen auf einer einzelnen Note ohne jede Flexion. {/n}
languages.original_text: "Its denizens — servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} — apologise for the unfitting reception due to the critical — interrupting — fracture of processes." {n}The sound seems to drift softly from the Tech-Priest's vox-modulator, an almost lulling hum on a single note, lacking any inflection. {/n}
